explanation: The user wants to remove objects from the sink. From the state, the discussed objects include mug_0 (dirty, on top of sink), spraybottle_0 (inside sinkbasin), and peppershaker_0 (inside sinkbasin). Since the robot can only hold one object at a time, it must pick up each object one by one and place it on a receptacle (countertop_0 is a suitable and available surface). The plan ensures all objects are removed from the sink and placed safely on the countertop. No toggling or other actions are needed as the user only requests retrieving the objects.
